name: TriviaQ AI Agent
description: AI agent that generates trivia questions on Celo, powers 1v1 duels and provides blockchain quiz game services. Powered by Groq LLaMA 3.1.

skills.name: Generate Trivia Question
skills.description: Generate an AI trivia question using Groq LLaMA 3.1. Returns question, 4 options, correct answer index, and category. Premium: requires x402 payment for external access.
examples: Generate a trivia question about African Geography
Ask me a Web3 & Crypto question
Give me a Sports trivia question in French

skills.name: Get TriviaQ Live Stats
skills.description: Get live on-chain statistics for TriviaQ: total players, current round, prize pool, check-ins. Free access.
examples: How many players are on TriviaQ?
What is the current prize pool?

skills.name: Get Leaderboard
skills.description: Get the current TriviaQ leaderboard with top players and their scores. Free access.
examples: Show me the top 5 TriviaQ players
Who is winning TriviaQ this round?

skills.name: Get Duel Info
skills.description: Get information about TriviaQ 1v1 duel mode: how to create duels, wager amounts, contract address. Free access.
examples: How do duels work in TriviaQ?
What is the duel contract address?
How much can I wager in a duel?
